overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a sunlit crosswalk under an overpass, past various storefronts and neon signs, through a sunken plaza area, and finally through an alley into an open plaza. The scene features futuristic architecture with bright neon advertisements and a mix of shadowed and sunlit areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow striped crosswalk toward the overpass structure

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO NEED FOR SPEED' on building facade
digital advertisement screen on yellow building wall showing animated character
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing with 'WALK' painted on asphalt
vertical traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
tall modern building with reflective glass windows and yellow structural elements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a sunlit urban intersection, facing a large digital billboard advertising 'EL GUAPO' above a yellow crosswalk. The player walks forward across the striped crossing toward an overpass structure, with modern glass buildings visible to the left and various storefronts ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

events.description: exiting the overpass shadow back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass past closed storefronts and pillars

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera under the overpass wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: concrete underside of the overpass creating deep shadow over the walkway
massive square support column for the overpass structure
storefront with metal shutter and green awning labeled 'PAWN SHOP'

segments.scene_description: Moving under the overpass, the scene becomes significantly darker as the concrete ceiling blocks the sunlight. The player walks between massive support pillars past a pawn shop with a green awning on the right. The segment ends as the player emerges back into bright sunlight at the far end of the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with sunken glass plaza and commercial storefronts

events.description: approaching the sunken plaza with glass railings and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated sidewalk past the sunken plaza and various shops

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as camera

entered.detail: mature deciduous tree with green foliage casting shadows on the walkway
transparent glass and metal railing bordering the sunken plaza level below
lower level pedestrian area with glass roof panels and teal structural elements
orange neon sign reading 'CALIENTE' above a storefront entrance
red neon sign reading 'BROOKLYN BARISTA' on the lower plaza level
corner building with green neon cross and 'PHARMACEUTICALS' signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass into bright sunlight, the player walks along an elevated sidewalk bordered by a glass railing overlooking a sunken plaza. The route passes various storefronts including a pharmacy with a green neon cross and a 'CALIENTE' sign, while trees provide intermittent shade along the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley opening into large urban plaza

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into the open plaza with palm trees
emerging from shadowed alley into bright sunlight of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway and emerging into the open plaza

notable_agents.action: running ahead into the plaza wearing light colored clothing
standing near the vending machine in the alley

entered.detail: purple neon sign with Asian characters and 'RUIQI' text above restaurant entrance
red and green automated vending kiosk with illuminated display
large open pedestrian area with circular building and multiple digital billboards
tall palm trees lining the central area of the plaza
multiple large digital advertisement screens on surrounding building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the pharmacy corner into a narrow, shadowed alleyway marked by a purple neon 'RUIQI' restaurant sign. The player passes a vending machine and other pedestrians before emerging into a bright, open plaza filled with palm trees and surrounded by towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city, moving from a sunlit intersection through shadowed underpasses and alleys into a sprawling open plaza. It begins at a bright urban crosswalk beneath a large digital billboard, moving forward toward a heavy concrete overpass. As the camera passes under the structure, the environment shifts into deep shadow between massive support pillars and a pawn shop before emerging back into the brilliant sunlight. The path then follows an elevated sidewalk past a pharmacy with a green neon cross, overlooking a sunken plaza until the camera turns into a narrow, purple-lit alleyway. Finally, the scene opens up as the camera exits the shadows and enters a wide, bright plaza filled with palm trees and towering buildings draped in massive digital advertisements.
